sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_punycode (id UInt32, encoded_string String, decoded_string String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_punycode SET decoded_string = punycodeDecode(encoded_string) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, encoded_string, punycodeDecode(encoded_string) AS decoded_string FROM test_punycode;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_punycode WHERE decoded_string != '';
